dispatch_app.management package¶

Submodules¶

dispatch_app.management.permissions_setup module¶

Logic for setting up application-specific groups and permissions. Automates the creation of Reader, Editor, and Journalist groups to ensure the application meets the security requirements out of the box.

dispatch_app.management.permissions_setup.create_application_groups(sender, **kwargs)[source]¶

Creates the default user groups and assigns the required permissions.

This function is triggered as a post-migration signal, ensuring that whenever the database schema is updated, the necessary groups exist.

Note: The ‘sender’ and ‘kwargs’ parameters are required by the Django signal API. We use them here to satisfy the function signature.
